title: Brazilian-Style Smoked Beef Tagliere
description: A fusion of Brazilian and Italian flavors, this dish features tender smoked beef served with a side of crispy sautéed vegetables and creamy tagliere sauce.
instructions: 2. Season the smoked beef with salt and pepper. Grill for 3-4 minutes per side, or until tender.
3. Meanwhile, heat 1 tablespoon of olive oil in a large skillet over medium heat.
4. Add the chopped onions and cook for 5 minutes, or until caramelized.
5. Add the minced garlic and cook for an additional 1 minute.
6. Stir in the Brazilian chili flakes and cook for 1 minute.
7. Add the tagliere sauce and stir to combine.
8. Reduce heat to low and simmer for 5 minutes, stirring occasionally.
9. Slice the grilled smoked beef against the grain.
10. Serve the beef with the sautéed onions and tagliere sauce.
11. Garnish with chopped cilantro and serve immediately.
